rulings.Case Title: PIER 39 LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. ZEN LOUIE LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial Date And Its Associated Dates (Discovery)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for January 9, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT ZEN LOUIE LLC Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial Date And Its Associated Dates is continued to January 13, 2020 on Court's own motion. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers no later than 4:00 p.m. on January 9, 2020. Mandatory Settlement Conference remains on calendar. Parties to appear and engage in good faith settlement discussions. =(501/CFH)
